---
title: "prexorctl deploy"
description: "Trigger a rolling deployment that propagates the group's current template\nchain and module composition to running instances"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Trigger a rolling deployment that propagates the group's current template
chain and module composition to running instances.
Rollout flags map to the controller's deployment rollout config: strategy,
batch size, canary, health gate, auto-rollback, and timeouts. Omitted flags
fall back to the group's update-strategy defaults.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl deploy <group> [flags]
  prexorctl deploy [command]
```

## Flags

```text
--auto-rollback           Roll back automatically on rollout failure
        --batch-size int          Instances rolled per batch (>=1)
        --canary-instances int    Number of canary instances (>=0)
        --canary-percent int      Canary percentage (0-100, mutually exclusive with --canary-instances)
        --health-gate             Require canary health gate before promoting the rollout
    -h, --help                    help for deploy
        --min-healthy int         Minimum healthy seconds before advancing a batch (>=0)
        --promotion-timeout int   Promotion timeout in seconds (>=1)
        --strategy string         Rollout strategy (overrides the group default)
    -y, --yes                     Skip the rollout confirmation prompt
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
